'''ngamoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whalewatching|whalewatching]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whalewatching|whalewatching]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngamoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæmereth|ngæmereth]] || [[word:ngæmerej|ngæmerej]] || [[word:ngæmeresh|ngæmeresh]] || [[word:ngæmere|ngæmere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamomoroth|ngamomoroth]] || [[word:ngamomoroj|ngamomoroj]] || [[word:ngamomorosh|ngamomorosh]] || [[word:ngamomoro|ngamomoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamoroth|ngamoroth]] || [[word:ngamoroj|ngamoroj]] || [[word:ngamorosh|ngamorosh]] || [[word:ngamoro|ngamoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamofroth|ngamofroth]] || [[word:ngamofroj|ngamofroj]] || [[word:ngamofrosh|ngamofrosh]] || [[word:ngamofrof|ngamofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngamorotho|ngamorotho]] || [[word:ngamorojo|ngamorojo]] || [[word:ngamorosho|ngamorosho]] || [[word:ngamoroko|ngamoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngamoroth|ngamoroth]] || [[word:ngamoroj|ngamoroj]] || [[word:ngamorosh|ngamorosh]] || [[word:ngamoro|ngamoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngamorothol|ngamorothol]] || [[word:ngamorojol|ngamorojol]] || [[word:ngamoroshol|ngamoroshol]] || [[word:ngamorokol|ngamorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngamorothotho|ngamorothotho]] || [[word:ngamorojojo|ngamorojojo]] || [[word:ngamoroshosho|ngamoroshosho]] || [[word:ngamoroko|ngamoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngamorothon|ngamorothon]] || [[word:ngamorojon|ngamorojon]] || [[word:ngamoroshon|ngamoroshon]] || [[word:ngamorokon|ngamorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngamorothoro|ngamorothoro]] || [[word:ngamorojoro|ngamorojoro]] || [[word:ngamoroshoro|ngamoroshoro]] || [[word:ngamorokoro|ngamorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
